data.title: FDA Approves Dexcom's 15-Day Wearable Glucose Management System. Company Plans US Launch
data.description: Dexcom G7 15-Day CGM approved by FDA for adults with diabetes; U.S. launch set for late 2025 with extended wear and advanced tracking features.

data.title: Millionaire Trader Rakes In $1 Million On The Meme Coin That's Outpacing Dogecoin, Shiba Inu
data.description: Fartcoin (CRYPTO: FARTCOIN) has soared nearly 85% in the past week, mimicking the early stages of Pepe's (CRYPTO: PEPE) legendary meme coin run.

data.title: Crypto Slump On Trump Tariff Sparks COVID Crash Comparisons: Here's How They Compare
Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Lose Steam, Trader Warns Of 'New Lows' Under One Condition
data.description: The crypto market is showing signs of cooling after a sharp rally on Wednesday.

data.title: Tech Stocks Slip As Market Reverses Post-Tariff Rally: What's Going On?
data.description: Shares of major technology companies, including Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL), Advanced Micro Devices Inc.(NASDAQ: AMD) and Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOGL) are trading lower Thursday following a broader market pullback after Wednesday's sharp rally.
